note: Gym leaders & their teams per game. Species resolve to sprites/types at runtime from pokemon-index.json. `sprite` is a Pokémon Showdown trainer-sprite slug (play.pokemonshowdown.com/sprites/trainers/<sprite>.png). Pokémon may carry optional level / item / ability / moves. Sources: pokemondb.net (official teams+levels), community nuzlocke guides (hack ROM teams+level caps).

games.source: community nuzlocke guide — teams + level caps (movesets/items vary by version & difficulty)
